headline: Dow Jones Industrial Average® Celebrates 130 Years as Iconic American Benchmark
summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices today celebrates the 130th anniversary of the Dow Jones Industrial Average, one of the world's most recognized stock market indices and one of the most enduring measures of American markets strength.

headline: S&P Global Announces Leadership Change for Market Intelligence, Evolution of Enterprise Data, Technology & Transformation
summary: S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) announced today that Saugata Saha, President of S&P Global Market Intelligence and Chief Enterprise Data Officer, has decided to leave the company to pursue another opportunity. Mr. Saha will remain with S&P Global through July 30, 2026, to support transition.

headline: Investors ‘afraid’ to take position on oil, data chiefs say as tankers face potential Hormuz fees
summary: Oil markets fear Iran may impose fees on ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz as part of any peace deal with the U.S.

headline: S&P Global Energy president Dave Ernsberger warns the principle of freedom of maritime flow is at stake
summary: S&P Global Energy president Dave Ernsberger told CNBC's "Squawk Box Europe" that investors are "afraid to take a position" amid oil market volatility.

headline: Best Dividend Kings: May 2026
